message:
chore(core): remove dangling spectral export and fix B23b/B23c test I/O layer

Two small cleanups tracked by ft-p48pw support tasks:

lib.rs (ft-p48pw.3):
- Remove dangling `pub mod spectral;` export — the spectral module was
  previously removed but the re-export in the module list was left behind,
  causing compilation to fail if the module file doesn't exist on disk.

vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs (ft-p48pw.2):
- Remove unused AsyncReadExt import (only AsyncWriteExt is needed)
- Migrate stream.read() calls in B23b and B23c integration tests to
  runtime_compat::io::read(), which is the runtime-agnostic I/O helper.
  The tests should exercise the Cx-aware async contract through the
  abstraction layer, not through the raw trait method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
